member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.ICrudService`2.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Gets all the instances of in the database.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.ICrudService`2.GetByIdAsync(`1)
member.summary: Gets a specific by its ID.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.ICrudService`2.UpdateAsync(`0)
member.summary: Updates a in the database with new values. It is a full replace, any null fields will be updated to null in the database. This also does not add/update related entities to the database.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.Professors.IProfessorService.UpdateStudentsAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Updates the students for a professor. This is a complete replacement for the related students and needs to include all students. Business rule: A professor can supervise at most 5 students at a time.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.Professors.IProfessorService.UpdateSubjectsAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Updates the subjects for a professor. This is a complete replacement for the related subjects and needs to include all subjects. Business rule: A professor can teach at most 3 subjects at a time.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.Professors.IProfessorService.GetSubjectsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the subjects for a professor. If there are no subjects, no exception is thrown, an empty set is returned.

member.name: M:OpenAPI2023.Services.Professors.IProfessorService.GetStudentsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the students for a professor. If there are no students, no exception is thrown, an empty set is returned.
